svg.title: SVG Image created as PCB_glove-CAMERA PLACEHOLDERS.svg date 2026/07/20 23:02:59

g.text: CAMERA PLACEHOLDERS — NO APPROVED CAMERA SCHEMATIC

g.desc: CAMERA PLACEHOLDERS — NO APPROVED CAMERA SCHEMATIC

g.text: CAM-6GY-152VIS / CAM-66GY connector and STM32N6570-DK compatibility are unresolved.

g.desc: CAM-6GY-152VIS / CAM-66GY connector and STM32N6570-DK compatibility are unresolved.

g.text: No connector, footprint, rail, sequencing, MIPI lane, I2C, clock, reset, GPIO, or protection wiring is defined.

g.desc: No connector, footprint, rail, sequencing, MIPI lane, I2C, clock, reset, GPIO, or protection wiring is defined.

g.text: A second simultaneous DK camera path is unproven; only one dedicated DK camera connector was identified in preliminary notes.

g.desc: A second simultaneous DK camera path is unproven; only one dedicated DK camera connector was identified in preliminary notes.

g.text: No connector, footprint, rail, sequencing, MIPI lane, I2C, clock, reset, GPIO, or protection wiring is defined.

g.desc: No connector, footprint, rail, sequencing, MIPI lane, I2C, clock, reset, GPIO, or protection wiring is defined.

g.text: Prior proposal note: DK CN14 is 22-pin while CAM-6GY is 30-pin; direct mechanical compatibility is not established.

g.desc: Prior proposal note: DK CN14 is 22-pin while CAM-6GY is 30-pin; direct mechanical compatibility is not established.

g.text: Official local documents required: UM3300, MB1939 schematic, CAM-66GY data brief, VD66GY datasheet, and integration manual.

g.desc: Official local documents required: UM3300, MB1939 schematic, CAM-66GY data brief, VD66GY datasheet, and integration manual.

g.text: Camera rails (2.8 V / 1.8 V / 1.15 V preliminary), sequencing, CSI lanes, control, clock, reset, GPIO, and connector footprint must be proven.

g.desc: Camera rails (2.8 V / 1.8 V / 1.15 V preliminary), sequencing, CSI lanes, control, clock, reset, GPIO, and connector footprint must be proven.

g.text: NO CAMERA SCHEMATIC IS APPROVED BEYOND THESE PLACEHOLDERS.

g.desc: NO CAMERA SCHEMATIC IS APPROVED BEYOND THESE PLACEHOLDERS.
